en: I don't know if you remember this, but we met before.
Oh, I remember.
Do you remember this? It was really embarrassing for me. Yes. It was?
Yeah. I have not seen you since then. I have not. Right?
That is correct. No.
But this was years ago, and I do you want me to tell my version of the story?
Yeah, you tell your version.
I'm walking down the street in New York City.
Yeah. My friend Rick calls me and says, dude, what are you doing? I go, I'm just walking down the street.
He goes, I have Nicole Kidman with me,
and she wants to meet you for maybe to be in Bewitched or something like that.
So I go, what? Okay.
She goes, I can be in your apartment in like 10 minutes.
I go, you're going to bring Nicole Kidman over to my apartment?
I'm like, okay, I don't know.
What do I do? What do I have something? What do I do? He goes, I don't know.
Just get some cheese and crackers or something.
And I'm like, I'm like cheese and crackers. I don't even talk about that.
I don't I don't have dinner parties. I don't have anyone over my house.
I'm like, I have video games and sneakers.
I mean, I really.
So I go and I go, there's a deli and I go in the deli. I go, what?
